title: LCX - REKT
relevance_summary: Hot wallet private key compromise leading to large fund theft

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds from a known compromised hot wallet address

red_flags: Large transfers from known hot wallet address
monitoring_rules: Block any tx from known compromised hot wallet address
summary: LCX, a centralized exchange, suffered a private key compromise resulting in $7.94M theft. A guard could have blocked transactions from the known compromised hot wallet address.
